mapper.sql: id, team_id, user_id, order_id, role, status, join_time, pay_time
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO group_buy_member (team_id, user_id, order_id, role, status, join_time, pay_time) VALUES (#{teamId}, #{userId}, #{orderId}, #{role}, #{status}, #{joinTime}, #{payTime})
mapper.select: SELECT FROM group_buy_member WHERE id = #{id} LIMIT 1
SELECT FROM group_buy_member WHERE team_id = #{teamId} ORDER BY join_time ASC, id ASC
mapper.update: UPDATE group_buy_member SET pay_time = NOW(), status = 1 WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(1) FROM group_buy_member WHERE team_id = #{teamId} AND status = 1
